Built for Busy Service Professionals, Not Tech Geeks

If you’re great at your work but don’t have the time, interest, or budget to mess with websites, hosting, calendars, or email setup, this is for you. ?

Massage Therapists Consultants & Coaches Lawyers & Legal Consultants Electricians & Local Trades Solo Professionals DoctorsFreelancersMicro-Businesses

Massage Therapists

Take online bookings, reduce no-shows, and stop juggling messages across WhatsApp, SMS, and Instagram DMs.

Consultants & Coaches

Share a clean profile page, take discovery calls via a booking link, and look credible in front of clients.

Lawyers & Legal Consultants

Present a professional website, collect qualified enquiries, and reply from a branded email instead of Gmail/Yahoo.

Electricians & Local Trades

Make it easy for customers to find you online, request quotes, and book slots based on your real availability.

Not on this list? If you sell your time or expertise, this still works perfectly for you.

If Your Business Only Lives on WhatsApp & Word of Mouth, You’re Leaving Money on the Table

Your ideal clients are searching online before they call anyone. But right now, you might be invisible or hard to book.

You might recognise yourself in this:

  • Using only a Facebook page or Google listing, with no real website.
  • Missing enquiries when you’re busy, driving, or asleep.
  • Sharing a Gmail, Yahoo, or Hotmail address that doesn’t look professional.
  • Wasting time manually confirming and rescheduling appointments with every client.


All because setting up “a proper website” sounds expensive, confusing, or like a huge time-sink. That’s exactly the problem AAPTA SOLUTIONS solves for you.

  Learn More  Subscribe Now

The AAPTA Business Starter Kit – Your Entire Online Presence Done-For-You

One simple monthly plan that gives you everything you actually need to look professional, get booked, and stay organised.

A Clean, Modern Website

A fast, mobile-friendly website (1–3 pages) with:

  • Your services, pricing, and about info
  • Contact form and clear call-to-action buttons
  • Connected to your booking link and email

No builders, no templates to wrestle with. We design and manage it for you.

cal.com Booking Integration

We connect your site to cal.com (free plan), so clients can:

  • See your real-time availability
  • Book appointments online
  • Receive automatic confirmations
  • Sync bookings with your Google Calendar

You stop playing appointment ping-pong, and your day runs on autopilot.

Professional Google Workspace Email

Get a branded email like you@yourbusiness.com, powered by Google Workspace (GSuite), including:

  • Business email with your domain
  • Calendar for your schedule
  • Drive/Docs for your files

Your communication looks serious, not “side hustle”.

Hosting, Maintenance & Support

We keep everything running:

  • Secure, fast hosting handled by us
  • Core updates, backups & uptime checks
  • Minor content changes each month (timings, prices, contact details)

So you can focus fully on serving your clients.

Get the Starter Plan for just $49/month or the Advanced Plan for $99/month
When you choose annual billing. Save up to 20%!

Why Trust Us With Your Online Presence?

AAPTA SOLUTIONS is led by Dharmendra Asimi, a web & digital strategist with over 18 years of experience building websites, marketing funnels, and automation for businesses across the globe.

"My goal is to handle all the complex technical work so you can focus on your business. Getting online isn't simple—but with my help, it feels effortless for you."

Go From “No Website” to “Bookable Online” in 5 Days

A simple, guided process. You give us your details, we handle the rest. Most projects go live within 5 business days.

Start Now

1 - Quick Intake Form

You fill a short form with your services, pricing, working hours, and basic business details.

2 - We Design Your Site

We create a clean, modern website tailored to your profession and content, using proven layouts.

3 - Email & Calendar Setup

We configure your Google Workspace email and connect your calendar ready for booking.

4 - Booking Link Connected

Your website gets a clear “Book Now” button linked to cal.com, synced with your availability.

5 - Launch & Share

We go live, test everything, and you start sharing your website link everywhere your clients are.

Frequently Asked Questions

A few common questions from solo professionals before they get started.

Is there any setup fee?

For this offer, no. Your setup, design, and integration are included in the $49/month (Billed Annually) or $59/month (Billed Monthly). If your needs are more complex, we’ll discuss options upfront.

What if I already have a domain name?

Great. We can connect your existing domain to your new website. If you don’t have one, we’ll help you choose and register a suitable domain (domain cost extra at actuals).

Is $49/month really enough to cover everything? What’s the catch?

There’s no catch. We standardised this offer around very focused websites (1–3 pages) and a streamlined setup so we can keep costs low and pass on the benefit to you.

How long will it take to go live?

In most cases, your site, email, and booking system are live within 5 business days after we receive your completed intake form and content.

Do I need to know anything about websites or tech?

Not at all. You give us your details, we design, set up, launch, and maintain everything. You just share the website link with your clients.

What about my existing Gmail or Yahoo email?

We’ll create a professional Google Workspace email for you. You can still forward mails or gradually migrate your conversations over to the new address.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes, you can cancel at any time. Once cancelled, your hosting and managed services stop. You can request an export of your site at an additional one-time fee if you’d like to move it elsewhere.

Can you also help with marketing?

Yes. Beyond this starter package, AAPTA SOLUTIONS offers SEO, local search optimisation, social media setup, and paid ads management as separate services.
